title: AI #173: AI Pauses
whyItMatters: A lot of things are always happening. Only one story matters. Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 were shut down, by the White House , via an imposition of export controls at 5:23pm on Friday, wreaking all sorts of havoc. There was then a scramble. Anthropic flew its people out to Washington , where they met with the Trump Administration on Monday, with hope…
